_comment: SUBPRIME auto-loan ABS only (works with absee.py's auto-loan field defaults). Prime shelves were removed so the dashboard speaks one collateral grade. Entries with cik '0' are placeholders -- run `python absee.py find "<shelf name>"` to look up the real trust CIK, then paste it in. The deal names match data/deals.csv so synthetic and real data line up on swap. CMBS, credit-card, lease, and depositor entities are excluded: different ABS-EE schemas or no asset-level data.
